query:
SELECT DISTINCT address FROM establishments WHERE 
address LIKE '%Angelica%' AND address NOT LIKE '%Angélica%'
OR address LIKE '%Consolacao%' AND address NOT LIKE '%Consolação%'
OR address LIKE '%Paraiso%' AND address NOT LIKE '%Paraíso%'
OR address LIKE '%Itapetininga%'
OR address LIKE '%Brasilio%'
OR address LIKE '%Inacio%' AND address NOT LIKE '%Inácio%'
OR address LIKE '%Joao%' AND address NOT LIKE '%João%'
OR address LIKE '%Antonio%' AND address NOT LIKE '%Antônio%'
OR address LIKE '%Olimpia%' AND address NOT LIKE '%Olímpia%'
LIMIT 20;
command:

LIMIT 20;
